get.description: Returns a list of all available agents in the system (both code-defined and stored)
Returns a list of all configured AI model providers
Returns details for a specific agent including configuration, tools, and memory settings

post.description: Clones a code-defined or stored agent to a new stored agent in the database

instructions.description: System instructions for the agent (string or array of instruction blocks)

model.description: Model configuration — static value or array of conditional variants

tools.description: Tool keys mapped to per-tool config — static or conditional

defaultOptions.description: Default options for generate/stream calls — static or conditional

workflows.description: Array of workflow keys — static or conditional

agents.description: Array of agent keys — static or conditional

integrationTools.description: Map of tool provider IDs to their tool configurations — static or conditional

mcpClients.description: Map of stored MCP client IDs to their tool configurations — static or conditional

inputProcessors.description: Array of processor keys — static or conditional

outputProcessors.description: Array of processor keys — static or conditional

vector.description: Vector database identifier or false to disable

options.description: Memory behavior configuration, excluding workingMemory and threads

topK.description: Number of semantically similar messages to retrieve

messageRange.description: Amount of surrounding context to include with each retrieved message

indexName.description: Index name for the vector store

embedder.description: Embedding model ID in the format "provider/model" (e.g., "openai/text-embedding-3-small")

embedderOptions.description: Options to pass to the embedder, omitting telemetry

model.description: Model ID for both Observer and Reflector

shareTokenBudget.description: Share token budget between messages and observations

bufferActivation.description: Ratio of buffered observations to activate

Declines a pending network tool call and continues network agent execution without executing the tool

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. Available fields: result, error, payload, steps, activeStepsPath, serializedStepGraph. Metadata fields (runId, workflowName, resourceId, createdAt, updatedAt) and status are always included.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of traces with optional filtering and sorting

perPage.description: Number of items per page, or false if pagination is disabled

hasMore.description: True if more pages are available

spanId.description: Unique span identifier within a trace

spanType.description: Span type (e.g., WORKFLOW_RUN, AGENT_RUN, TOOL_CALL, etc.)

isEvent.description: Whether this is an event (point-in-time) vs a span (duration)

requestId.description: HTTP request ID for log correlation

tags.description: Labels for filtering traces (only on the root span)

links.description: References to related spans in other traces

anyOf.description: Input data passed to the span

endExclusive.description: When true, excludes the end date from results (uses < instead of <=)
